name: C# / .NET Engineering
description: C#/.NET 开发:ASP.NET、NuGet 与生态工具

detector.inline: profile.languages.includes('csharp') || profile.languages.includes('c#') || profile.repo_signals.some((s) => s.endsWith('.csproj') || s.endsWith('.sln') || s === 'global.json' || s === 'Directory.Build.props' || s === 'NuGet.config') || profile.frameworks.some((f) => ['dotnet','aspnet','asp.net'].includes(f)) ? 0.86 : 0
